meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve no version control (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Solve No Version Control
content.seo_description: Learn how to use AI debugging to recover from missing version control. A pro-level guide for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to restore stability.
content.answer_block: When version control is absent, you must treat your codebase as a forensic site. Use AI to generate comprehensive diff snapshots, map dependency trees, and perform 'destructive-testing-in-sandbox' to isolate bugs. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you can reconstruct stable states without manual regression testing, ensuring client deliverables remain professional and functional.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a production server that feels like a house of cards, and you just realized there is no Git history. The client’s legacy codebase is a monolith of spaghetti, and one wrong move could trigger a cascade of failures. The silence of an empty commit history is the sound of a freelancer’s worst nightmare.

But panic is a luxury you can't afford. By leveraging modern AI agents, you can treat this chaos like a forensic investigation. We aren't just fixing bugs; we are reverse-engineering stability. Using a combination of Antigravity for structural analysis and Claude Code for surgical execution, you can stabilize and document an undocumented environment in record time.

steps.title: Forensic Snapshotting
steps.description: Before touching the code, generate a complete architectural map to understand the current state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this directory structure and generate a dependency graph identifying potential points of failure in the current monolithic architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'map the dependency tree and output to architecture.md'

steps.title: Automated Delta Generation
steps.description: Create a localized 'shadow' version control by generating comprehensive documentation of the current state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the existing files and create a comprehensive technical audit identifying deprecated functions and high-risk modules.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a technical_audit.md detailing all high-risk functions and current logic flow'

steps.title: Surgical Isolation
steps.description: Isolate the buggy module into a sandbox to prevent regression during the repair process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified buggy module into a self-contained, testable unit without breaking existing dependencies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'isolate the authentication module into a separate folder and create a mock test suite'

steps.title: Intelligent Regression Testing
steps.description: Use AI to write tests that verify current behavior before applying any fixes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of integration tests based on the current observed behavior to ensure future changes do not cause regressions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate Jest tests covering all critical paths identified in the current state'

steps.title: Final Commit-State Injection
steps.description: Initialize a local Git repository and commit the now-stable state with AI-generated documentation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate detailed commit messages for the current stable state and structure them into a logical history.
steps.claude_code_command: git init && git add . && git commit -m 'Initial forensic recovery: stabilized legacy monolith'

pro_tips: Always run Claude Code in a read-only context first to verify your assumptions before allowing it to modify the file system.
Use Antigravity to generate 'state-diffs' periodically; it acts as a virtual version control system when Git is unavailable.
Tag your AI-generated code blocks with unique IDs so you can easily sweep and replace them during future refactors.
Keep a 'shadow log' of every AI command executed; this serves as your technical debt documentation for the client.
Force AI to output unit tests before the logic; this forces the model to understand the expected outcome before attempting the fix.
content.next_steps: Once the codebase is stabilized and under local version control, implement a CI/CD pipeline to ensure this lack of version control never happens again.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting legacy code and start shipping with the speed of a senior engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
